families.label: Remote Sensing
families.description: Earth observation missions (optical, hyperspectral, thermal, SAR) with revisit-driven constellation sizing.

payload_categories.label: Hyperspectral
payload_categories.description: High spectral resolution imaging for material classification and analytics.

payload_categories.label: Multispectral
payload_categories.description: Multi-band imaging for agriculture, land use, and environmental monitoring.

payload_categories.label: VHR Optical
payload_categories.description: Very-high-resolution optical imaging with tighter pointing constraints.

payload_categories.label: Thermal
payload_categories.description: Thermal infrared imaging for heat signatures and temperature mapping.

payload_categories.label: SAR
payload_categories.description: Synthetic aperture radar for all-weather, day/night imaging and surface deformation.

payload_categories.label: My Payload
payload_categories.description: Confidential synthetic payload input (dimensions, mass, power, optional data/pointing/thermal).

families.label: IoT / Communication
families.description: Store-and-forward IoT and communications missions with data-rate and link-driven sizing.

payload_categories.label: IoT Store-and-Forward
payload_categories.description: Collect bursts from ground terminals and downlink later on scheduled passes.

payload_categories.label: Broadband Comms
payload_categories.description: Higher throughput communications payloads with power and thermal implications.

payload_categories.label: Optical Comms
payload_categories.description: Laser communications with pointing and acquisition constraints.

payload_categories.label: Secure Comms
payload_categories.description: Mission modes requiring enhanced security and crypto-accelerated processing.

payload_categories.label: My Payload
payload_categories.description: Confidential synthetic payload input (dimensions, mass, power, optional data/pointing/thermal).

families.label: Navigation
families.description: Navigation-related missions including PNT augmentation, tracking, and timing experiments.

payload_categories.label: PNT Augmentation
payload_categories.description: Payloads intended to augment positioning, navigation, and timing services.

payload_categories.label: AIS / ADS-B Tracking
payload_categories.description: Tracking payloads for maritime (AIS) and aviation (ADS-B) signal reception.

payload_categories.label: RF Navigation Payload
payload_categories.description: RF navigation experiments (signal generation, reception, and measurement).

payload_categories.label: Timing / Navigation Experiment
payload_categories.description: Precision timing and navigation experiment payloads with stability constraints.

payload_categories.label: My Payload
payload_categories.description: Confidential synthetic payload input (dimensions, mass, power, optional data/pointing/thermal).
